name: Windows utilities · Info+ CLI (multi_scripts_lib/work)
description: PyInstaller-oriented CLI utility living under multi_scripts_lib/work/Info+_CLI—packaged Windows tooling with documented build flags.
longDescription: CLI utility within the `multi_scripts_lib` monorepo (`work/Info+_CLI`), built with PyInstaller (`--onefile`, icon, version resources) around `runScriptDecode.py`. Presented here as its own entry alongside other `work/` utilities rather than as the whole monorepo. Implementation lives under the monorepo’s `work` folder in source control.
features: Version resource and icon embedding guidance
challenges: Small monorepo slices often ship with minimal documentation.
solutions: Describe capabilities that match the code and build instructions; the source link points to the exact subtree.
security: Sign binaries when distributing outside internal networks
Avoid embedding secrets inside frozen executables
